# Turn Off Bathroom Water

## Outcome

Water supply is shut off before plumbing work begins.

## Steps

1. Locate the bathroom isolation valve.

2. Turn the valve clockwise until closed.

3. Open the vanity tap.
   Expected: No water flows after residual pressure is released.
